pilot.name: Name (or legal alias)
pilot.identProtocol: Union Administrative RM-4 Pilot Identification Protocol (IDENT) Record
pilot.identRecord: Union Administrative RM-4 Pilot Identification Protocol (IDENT) Record
pilot.legalDisclaimer: Improper use of this IDENT record and/or its constituent data by the record holder or any other persons is punishable under the DoJ/HR A-645-c. This record is the property of the Union Administrative Office and the information herein must be transmitted on request under NDL-C-DISCORDANT-BREATH encryption protocols. This RM-4 record must be updated every five (5) Cradle Standard Years of objective time to retain GMS licensing rights. Far-field operatives that anticipate deployments lasting longer than five Cradle Standard Years that have not been issued a man-portable Omninet Hook should apply for the RM-11-B IDENT Supplemental (b) Extension. Contact your local Union Adminstrative Officer for any other matters regarding this record.
